Metadata.description: The missionary communication and management platform

Footer.tagline: The platform that centralizes communication and support between missionaries and their partners.

perfil-publico.title: Public profile
perfil-publico.description: A professional page for you, with public, private, or invisible (stealth) mode.
bullets: A single link to share with partners
Story, journey, and projects in one place

projetos.title: Projects and campaigns
projetos.description: Financial goals, category-based budgets, milestones, and reports.
bullets: Single goal or detailed budget by category

crm-parceiros.title: Partner CRM
crm-parceiros.description: Organize who prays, who gives, and who represents your mission.

financeiro.title: Multi-currency finances
financeiro.description: Accounts, categories, and offering reconciliation — solo or with a team.

oracao.title: Prayer requests
oracao.description: A direct channel between you and your prayer partners.

mensagens.title: Encrypted messages
mensagens.description: End-to-end (E2EE) conversations — not even we can access the content.

notificacoes.title: Real-time notifications
notificacoes.description: Know instantly when someone gives, prays for you, or sends a message.

Landing.heroSubtitle: Publish updates, manage partners, track finances in multiple currencies, and keep in touch securely — all in one place.
Landing.heroBadgeSubtitle: You just focus on spreading the Word.
Landing.heroImageAlt: Smiling missionary in the field, free to dedicate himself to the work
Landing.diffShieldDesc: Messages and sensitive information — not even we have access.
Landing.diffMoneyTitle: The money goes straight to you
Landing.diffMoneyDesc: The platform never handles your offerings.
Landing.diffGlobalDesc: Supporters in any country — you log and track everything in whatever currency you receive.
Landing.comoFuncionaSubtitle: In a few minutes you'll have everything ready to share with your partners.
Landing.step1Desc: Quick sign-up with email or Google.
Landing.step2Desc: Name, photo, bio, and your mission's story.
Landing.step3Title: Set up how you receive support
Landing.step3Desc: Pix, PayPal, Wise, or another donation link.
Landing.step4Desc: A campaign to share with your partners.
Landing.modulesSubtitle: Replace scattered Instagram, WhatsApp, PDFs, email, and Pix with a single system.
Landing.deepDiveImageAlt: Smiling missionary holding a Bible, in the field
Landing.planosTitle: A plan for every stage of the mission
Landing.planosSubtitle: Start for free. Upgrade as your support network grows.

PricingPage.title: A plan for every stage of your mission
PricingPage.subtitle: Trade scattered spreadsheets, PDFs, and messages for a single place where your partners follow your mission — and you receive their support with transparency.
PricingPage.notConfigured: International payments are coming soon — we're activating Stripe to accept cards from all over the world.
PricingPage.moneyTitle: The money goes straight to you
PricingPage.moneyDesc: The platform never handles your offerings.
PricingPage.acceptsGlobalCards: Accepts cards from anywhere, automatically charged in the local currency. International payments via Stripe — activation coming soon.

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: For those who live off partner support

mission.name: Mission
mission.tagline: For couples and families in the field

Auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
Auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
Auth.resetSentSubtitle: If an account exists for {email}, you'll receive a link to reset your password.
Auth.resetLinkInvalidSubtitle: Request a new password reset link.
Auth.newPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account

SettingsPage.title: Settings
SettingsPage.subtitle: Manage your profile, payments, and privacy.

ProfileForm.usernameInvalid: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and _. Minimum 3 characters.
ProfileForm.showLocation: Show my location on my public profile
ProfileForm.showLocationHint: Protected data: only shown publicly if this option is checked.
ProfileForm.missionStartDateHint: Used in the "join what the Lord has been doing since '{ano}'" message on the partnership page.

PaymentMethods.intro: This information is shown on your public profile so partners know how to support your mission. The money goes straight to you — the platform doesn't take a cut.
PaymentMethods.empty: No payment method added yet. Add at least one so partners know how to support you.
PaymentMethods.detailsPlaceholder: E.g. bank name, SWIFT/BIC, wallet network...
PaymentMethods.errorValueRequired: Fill in the key/link for this method.
PaymentMethods.placeholder_pix: CPF, email, phone, or random key
PaymentMethods.placeholder_zelle: Email or phone registered with Zelle

PrivacyForm.publicDescription: Your profile shows up on Google, with a friendly @username URL. Partners and anyone else can access it.
PrivacyForm.privateDescription: Accessible only with a direct link + an approved partner login. Not indexed by search engines.
PrivacyForm.stealthDescription: No indexing (noindex), random hash URL, name hidden in meta tags, location hidden. Maximum privacy.
PrivacyForm.stealthWarning: Warning: in Stealth mode, your profile is inaccessible to new partners who don't have the link.

SensitiveDataForm.errorDecrypt: Couldn't decrypt your previously saved sensitive data.
SensitiveDataForm.encryptionNotice: These fields are end-to-end encrypted — not even go_guide can read them. They're only visible to you and to partners you explicitly grant access to under "Access" in the partner CRM.
SensitiveDataForm.realLocationPlaceholder: Real city/country, if different from what's shown publicly
SensitiveDataForm.realNamePlaceholder: If different from your public name/alias

AccessManagersForm.accessDescription: Managers have the same access as the account owner (except deleting the account). Viewers can only see reports.
AccessManagersForm.inviteHint: The person must already have a go→guide account with that email.
AccessManagersForm.paymentsNotConfigured: Payments not configured yet — coming soon.
AccessManagersForm.seatLimitReached: Your plan's manager limit has been reached. Buy more seats or upgrade.
AccessManagersForm.userNotFound: No account found with that email.

AccountForm.languageDescription: Choose the language for the public site and this account preference.
AccountForm.changePasswordDescription: Choose a strong password with at least 8 characters.
AccountForm.dangerZoneDescription: Deleting your account permanently removes all your data. This action cannot be undone.

LocaleContentTabs.manualPlaceholder: Type the translation manually, or use the button above
LocaleContentTabs.missingTranslations: No translation in: {locales}. Partners browsing in those languages will only see the original text.

AccountType.familyDescription: You and your spouse or family in the field.
AccountType.organizationDescription: A school, mission base, NGO, or team.
AccountType.organizationHint: We recommend a separate account (different email) for the organization, with its own public profile and Pix/PayPal key — so funds raised stay separate from your personal account. A project inside this profile always uses this account's payment details.
AccountType.bioPlaceholderIndividual: I'm John, serving in Nairobi since 2020. I work with youth discipleship on the outskirts of the city.
AccountType.bioPlaceholderFamily: We are John and Mary, serving in Nairobi since 2018. We work with church planting and youth discipleship on the outskirts of the city.
AccountType.bioPlaceholderOrganization: Such-and-such School has trained Christian leaders in Nairobi since 2015. Our mission is to prepare the next generation of pastors and missionaries in the region.
AccountType.bioHintIndividual: Tell who you are, where you serve, and what motivates you in the field. A good bio answers: who, where, and why — that's what makes visitors connect and want to support you.
AccountType.bioHintFamily: Tell who you are, where you serve, and what motivates you in the field. A good bio answers: who, where, and why — that's what makes visitors connect and want to support you.
AccountType.bioHintOrganization: Tell what the organization does, where it operates, and why it exists. A good bio answers: who, where, and why — that's what makes visitors connect and want to support you.

PublicProfile.pixAvailable: Pix available — ask the missionary for the key
PublicProfile.privateProfileMessage: This profile is private. Contact the missionary to request access.

DashboardOverview.subtitle: Here's a summary of your mission.

SetupChecklist.title: System setup pending
SetupChecklist.profileItem: Complete your profile — add a photo and choose your @username
SetupChecklist.paymentItem: Set up how you receive contributions (Pix, PayPal, Wise...)
SetupChecklist.projectItem: Create your first project to share with partners

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.pledgeConfirmedWithTitle: Your gift of {amount} was confirmed for {title}
Notifications.prayerReply: You received a reply to your prayer request
Notifications.highlightUpdate: A project you follow posted an update

Onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Let's set up your system in a few steps
Onboarding.step1Description: This information appears on your public profile — it can be about you, your family, or your organization in the field.
Onboarding.usernameInvalid: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and _. Minimum 3 characters.
Onboarding.showLocationLabel: Show my location on my public profile
Onboarding.showLocationHint: For safety, you can hide this information at any time — including later, in settings.
Onboarding.step2Title: Set up how you receive support
Onboarding.step2Description: How will your partners support you financially? The money goes straight to you — the platform doesn't handle it.
Onboarding.pixPlaceholder: ID, email, phone, or random key
Onboarding.step2MoreOptionsHint: Zelle, Mercado Pago, Alipay, M-Pesa, crypto, and other methods can be added later in Settings > Payments.
Onboarding.step3Description: A simple campaign to share with your partners. You can add details later.
Onboarding.step4Description: You can review or complete any item later, from your dashboard.
Onboarding.reminderNote: We'll remind you of pending items on your dashboard until you complete them.

Birthdays.title: Upcoming birthdays
Birthdays.waMessage: Happy birthday, {name}! 🎉 God bless you richly!
